owner_policy.standard: Keep existing good MAIN images. Repair only a genuinely missing, wrong, fictional or non-existent product/package. Minor count/layout/ice/text imperfections are non-blocking.

safety.statement: Read-only local planning artifact; no generation or external mutation.

shared_generation_groups.note: Same normalized exact recipe; one approved output can serve both ASINs.
